assertions.description: GPUCommandEncoder is exposed — host of copyBufferToBuffer.
The simplified copyBufferToBuffer(source, destination) overload works on a real device — copies the full source into the destination.
assertions.test: (async()=>{if(!navigator.gpu)return false;const adapter=await navigator.gpu.requestAdapter();if(!adapter)return false;const device=await adapter.requestDevice();const src=device.createBuffer({size:16,usage:GPUBufferUsage.COPY_SRC|GPUBufferUsage.COPY_DST});const dst=device.createBuffer({size:16,usage:GPUBufferUsage.COPY_SRC|GPUBufferUsage.COPY_DST});const enc=device.createCommandEncoder();try{enc.copyBufferToBuffer(src,dst);return true;}catch(e){return false;}finally{src.destroy();dst.destroy();device.destroy();}})()

assertions.description: The existing 5-argument copyBufferToBuffer form still works (regression check).
assertions.test: (async()=>{if(!navigator.gpu)return false;const adapter=await navigator.gpu.requestAdapter();if(!adapter)return false;const device=await adapter.requestDevice();const src=device.createBuffer({size:16,usage:GPUBufferUsage.COPY_SRC|GPUBufferUsage.COPY_DST});const dst=device.createBuffer({size:16,usage:GPUBufferUsage.COPY_SRC|GPUBufferUsage.COPY_DST});const enc=device.createCommandEncoder();try{enc.copyBufferToBuffer(src,0,dst,0,16);return true;}catch(e){return false;}finally{src.destroy();dst.destroy();device.destroy();}})()

assertions.description: navigator.gpu.requestAdapter is a function — required precursor to obtaining a command encoder.
